feed.title: SonorousMC
feed.subtitle: Join us at sonorous.minecraft.best with Minecraft 1.20.4

entry.title: Welcome to SonorousMC
entry.content:
Hello !

Our Mission Statement

SonorousMC is a Minecraft Server which provides an immersive fantasy experience through the use of a Paper Server and Minecraft Plugins

What are we

An immersive MMORPG Fantasy Minecraft server. Complete with Magical abilities, a rich custom world generator filled with fresh new structures. Tons of new mobs with the quality of Mods without additional downloads.
